text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our second summer camp has come to a close.
Before we return to the academy, I find Fine
Motion staring intently at the grounds.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
choice_data_list:
If there's still something you need to do, I'll join
you.

If there's still something you need to do, I'll join
you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's quite all right! I just thought I'd like to etch
this sight into my mind.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I never want to forget everything that happened
here and the things I learned... and the salty
flavor of the beach house's ramen...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
choice_data_list: Shall we have one last meal?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: My final bowl of camp ramen! Let's go at once!
